target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of multiple structural elements; significant portions of walls and roof missing; debris pile at base indicating structural failure; consistent with 75-100% damage threshold for destroyed buildings.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% structural failure. The scene shows a single, large, multi-story brick building in advanced decay, with collapsed walls, missing roof sections, and debris at its base. The functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and operational capability.
